subject: Weekly digest: parrot track in Vancouver | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-0045
body: Here is a progress summary for the parrot plan in Vancouver. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-0045. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
